actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 666190386, guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) matches script AttachToElevator. Scene serialization shows player: {fileID: 0} (null). BoxCollider (id: 666190388) is present with m_IsTrigger: 0 and the GameObject has no Rigidbody. The script only has private OnTriggerEnter/OnTriggerExit and no public methods. Intended behavior: when the Player enters the elevator collider, set Player as child of platform2 (3); when exiting, detach. To trigger these conditions, the collider must be set to IsTrigger=1 and 'player' must reference the Player object. Note: current code compares 'gameObject == player' instead of 'other.gameObject == player', so even with correct setup, it will not parent the Player unless 'player' is the same GameObject as platform2 (3), which is incorrect. There are no m_Calls (Interactable events) defined for this MonoBehaviour in the scene meta.
